title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens opened from App Settings > User Guides display correctly when navigating through all screens
steps: Locate and tap on User Guides
Swipe or tap through each onboarding screen to view all screens
Verify each onboarding screen displays correct content, images, and text
expected: All onboarding screens open successfully from App Settings > User Guides, and each screen displays correctly with proper content, images, and text when navigating through them.
